name: 23_both_systems_fail_both_reset
description: Branch 3 / Interaction: gate passes BUT both System A and System B conditions fail with non-zero prev counts -> both reset to 0.
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 1.0 >= cross 2.0 FALSE -> vwap_ticks reset to 0. System B: current_return -0.5 <= bleed_arm -1.0 FALSE -> bleed_ticks reset to 0. Both broken False. Returns (0, 0, False, False). Note: this is DIFFERENT from Branch 2 (gate-fail outer-reset) -- here the gate PASSES, but both inner conditions miss. The end state is identical (both 0/0/False/False) but the producer code-path is different.
